title: Creating an Agent's User Interface
scenario: Design a basic user interface for an agent that interacts with customers. The interface should include a way to initiate a conversation and a way to display answers. The output should be in the format of a simple screenshot.
constraints: Must include a screenshot of the interface

evaluationCriteria.description: Check if the output includes a screenshot of the interface and is within the 50-word limit.
Check if the screenshot is clear and easy to understand.
Check if the output is grammatically correct.
